name: Humaans
description: Humaans HR platform for managing employee records and org data

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Humaans
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new API token
4. Copy the token and paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an API token in Humaans → Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Humaans employees to verify HR records are up to date
